results.validation_notes: Deep context confirms Microservices (clear cmd/ service separation, multiple Dockerfiles, Kubernetes-native) and Event-Driven (RabbitMQ in technologies, hub-server/hub-agent pattern, cron service). However, DDD classification is downgraded because: (1) heuristic score was only 0.3 for DDD, (2) no visible domain/, aggregates/, entities/, or bounded-context directories in provided structure, (3) pkg/microservice/[service]/server/rest/ paths indicate REST API layering rather than DDD tactical patterns. The 129 container orchestration signals strongly support microservices, while the 3 messaging signals provide moderate event-driven confirmation.
